problem id: 3e847951
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  00001001 -> 00100101
  00011000 -> 01100011
  10010010 -> 01011000
  10110101 -> 11000000
  11010001 -> 01011101
  00101010 -> 10101101
  11000010 -> 00010011
  11000000 -> 00011011
  10001110 -> 00101011

query: 11101011
predicted answer: 10110010
